title: OneKeyMiner
description: This mod adds the ability to chain tools to break blocks and chain farming while holding down the chain button. If you break a block, the adjacent blocks will be destroyed together, or if you hold a seed, the adjacent farmland will also be planted.
body:

# 🛠️ OneKeyMiner (Forge / NeoForge) – Chain Mining & Planting Mod

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/your-server-id?label=Discord&logo=discord&color=7289DA)](https://discord.gg/ASVG5n5xAg)   [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-FF4500?logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/onekeyminer-nf)   [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-28A745?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/onekeyminer_nf)   [![Report Bug](https://img.shields.io/badge/Report-Bug-red?style=flat)](https://github.com/Mai-xiyu/OneKeyMiner-issues/issues)

[![OneKeyMiner Chainable Visuals | Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/OneKeyMiner-Chainable%20Visuals-1BD96A?logo=modrinth&labelColor=1E2328)](https://modrinth.com/mod/onekeyminer-chainable-visuals)[![OneKeyMiner Chainable Visuals | CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/OneKeyMiner-Chainable%20Visuals-FF6B00?logo=curseforge&labelColor=1E2328)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/onekeyminer-chainable-visuals)

[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1078620?label=CurseForge&color=FF4500&logo=none)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/onekeyminer-nf) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/onekeyminer_nf?label=Modrinth&color=28A745&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/mod/onekeyminer_nf)


## 📋 Overview

OneKeyMiner offers a seamless chain-mining and farming experience on both Forge and NeoForge. Hold down your chosen key (default: `~`) to auto-break adjacent identical blocks or plant seeds in bulk. Both versions deliver identical core functionality—mining, planting, tool durability protection—while NeoForge further expands interaction capabilities.
